name: Obscula
short_description: Face the fears lurking in the dark. Obscula is a psychological horror experience that tells the story of someone seeking the truth but finding themselves trapped in a nightmare. There's no escape, only answers… but are you ready for the truth?
detailed_description:
Obscula is a first-person psychological horror game that drags players into the depths of the mind, blending psychological terror with an oppressive atmosphere. Forgotten memories, distorted realities, and an overwhelming sense of dread lurk in every shadow. As you search for the truth, you must face the horrors that hide within the walls of this forsaken place.

Story:

You were once a servant in this house, but your past is nothing but a blur. Trapped within its decaying halls, you are haunted by eerie whispers, shadowy figures, and fragmented memories. Someone doesn’t want you to remember. But before you can uncover the truth, you must confront the illusions that cloud your mind.

This house is not what it seems. Behind each door lies more than just a room—it holds echoes of the past, watching, waiting. You must question everything you see, for every step forward may lead you closer to the truth… or deeper into madness.

Gameplay:

  • Atmospheric Horror: A slow-burning fear that lingers in every corner—Obscula builds tension through psychological dread rather than cheap jump scares.

  • Bone-Chilling Sound Design: Every whisper, every creak, and every distant footstep reminds you that you are never truly alone.

  • Story-Driven Exploration: Gather fragments of the past through environmental storytelling and unravel the dark truth hidden within the house.

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Brazil, Japanese, Russian, Turkish, Italian
*languages with full audio support
